---
title: "Now"
title-block-banner: false
---

A few things keep me busy these days:

- Raising 2 kids (8 and 5) and spending 12 hours a day with them when school is closed

::: {.callout-tip}

## Big picture question

How can we achieve carbon neutraliy by mid-centuraly in a just, resilient, and sustainable pathway?

:::

- I'm working with
